_comment: MCP server whitelist for FinRoot. mcp-security-gate.sh allows only servers listed here. All are optional; the build runs without any MCP server (sovereign/offline).

context7._use: fetch current LangChain/LangGraph/Pydantic docs during planning

tavily._use: optional web/news research for the News Interpreter (key-gated; Mock works without it)

fetch._use: optional URL fetch for document/news ingestion
